title: FSMA Preventive Controls Human Food
description: Implement Preventive Controls per FSMA for covered human food facilities.

title: Hazard Analysis
description: Conduct hazard analysis identifying biological, chemical, physical, and economically motivated hazards.

title: Process Preventive Controls
description: Implement process preventive controls with parameters and monitoring per FSMA.

title: Allergen Preventive Controls
description: Implement allergen controls including labeling and cross-contact prevention.

title: Sanitation Preventive Controls
description: Implement sanitation controls for environmental hygiene per FSMA.

title: Supply Chain Program
description: Verify suppliers per FSMA supply chain program requirements.

title: Recall Plan
description: Maintain written recall plan with procedures, contacts, and notifications.

title: PCQI Training
description: Designate Preventive Controls Qualified Individual with documented training.

title: Food Facility Registration
description: Register food facilities with FDA biennially per Bioterrorism Act.

title: Nutrition Facts Panel
description: Apply FDA Nutrition Facts panel labeling requirements.

title: Allergen Declaration
description: Declare top 9 major allergens per FALCPA.

title: Ingredient Statement
description: List ingredients in descending order of predominance by weight.

title: Net Contents Declaration
description: Declare net contents on principal display panel.

title: Country of Origin Labeling
description: Apply COOL requirements for covered foods per Tariff Act.

title: Health Claims Authorization
description: Use only FDA-authorized health claims per food labeling regulations.

title: Sanitary Transportation Rule
description: Maintain sanitary transportation per FSMA STR.

title: Intentional Adulteration Rule
description: Implement food defense plan per FSMA IA rule.

title: Traceability Rule for High-Risk Foods
description: Maintain traceability records for high-risk foods per FSMA Section 204.

title: HACCP for Meat and Poultry
description: Implement HACCP for federally regulated meat, poultry, and egg products.

title: Federal Inspection Required
description: Submit covered products to USDA FSIS continuous inspection.

title: FSIS Label Approval
description: Obtain prior label approval from FSIS for covered products.

title: Humane Slaughter Compliance
description: Apply Humane Methods of Slaughter Act requirements.

title: Low-Acid Canned Foods Regulations
description: Register and file process schedules for low-acid canned foods.

title: Acidified Foods Regulations
description: Comply with FDA acidified foods regulations including process scheduling.

title: Juice HACCP Rule
description: Apply HACCP to juice processing per FDA Juice HACCP rule.

title: Seafood HACCP Rule
description: Apply HACCP to seafood processing per FDA Seafood HACCP rule.

title: Shell Egg Safety Rule
description: Apply Shell Egg Safety Rule for shell egg producers.

title: Infant Formula Manufacturing
description: Apply FDA Infant Formula Quality Control regulations.

title: FDA Color Additive Approval
description: Use only FDA-approved color additives in food.

title: FDA Food Additive Approval
description: Use only FDA-approved or GRAS food additives.

title: Human Food cGMP
description: Apply current Good Manufacturing Practice for human food.

title: Supplement cGMP
description: Apply FDA cGMP for dietary supplement manufacturing.

title: Foreign Supplier Verification
description: Verify foreign suppliers per FSMA FSVP for imported food.

title: USDA AMS COOL Compliance
description: Apply USDA AMS country of origin labeling for covered commodities.

title: USDA Organic Labeling
description: Apply USDA NOP standards for organic-labeled foods.

title: Bioengineered Disclosure
description: Disclose bioengineered ingredients per USDA NBFDS.

title: FDA Menu Labeling Rule
description: Apply FDA menu labeling for chains with 20+ locations.

title: Major Food Allergen Labeling
description: Declare top 9 major food allergens per Food Allergen Labeling and Consumer Protection Act.

title: FTC Section 5 Compliance
description: Avoid unfair or deceptive food advertising practices.

title: Lanham Act False Advertising
description: Avoid false advertising per Lanham Act Section 43(a).

title: California Prop 65 Warning
description: Provide Prop 65 warnings for products containing listed chemicals sold in California.

title: EU FIC Regulation
description: Apply EU Food Information to Consumers Regulation for food labeling.

title: EU Food Hygiene Regulation
description: Apply HACCP per EU Food Hygiene Regulation.

title: EU Novel Food Authorization
description: Obtain authorization for novel foods per EU Novel Food Regulation.

title: EU Nutrition Health Claims
description: Use only authorized health claims per EU Regulation 1924/2006.

title: EU GMO Labeling
description: Label GMO foods per EU Regulation 1830/2003.

title: EU Animal Welfare for Food
description: Apply EU animal welfare rules at farm, transport, and slaughter.

title: EU Organic Regulation
description: Maintain EU organic certification for EU-sold organic products.

title: Codex Alimentarius Standards
description: Apply Codex Alimentarius food safety standards for international trade.

title: ISO 22000 FSMS
description: Establish food safety management system per ISO 22000.

title: FSSC 22000 Certification
description: Maintain FSSC 22000 GFSI-recognized certification.

title: BRCGS Food Safety
description: Maintain BRCGS Food Safety GFSI-recognized certification.

title: SQF Certification
description: Maintain SQF GFSI-recognized food safety certification.

title: IFS Food Certification
description: Maintain IFS Food GFSI-recognized certification.

title: Halal Certification
description: Maintain Halal certification per IFANCA or local certifier for Halal-marketed products.

title: Kosher Certification
description: Maintain Kosher certification per OU/OK/Star-K for Kosher-marketed products.

title: Color Additive Certification
description: Use only FDA-certified color additives where certification is required.

title: Food Contact Notifications
description: Use only FCN-cleared food contact substances in packaging.

title: BSE/TSE Risk Material Removal
description: Remove specified risk materials per BSE rules in beef processing.

title: Listeria Control for RTE Foods
description: Implement Listeria controls for ready-to-eat foods per FDA guidance.

title: Partially Hydrogenated Oil Ban
description: Avoid PHO use as no longer GRAS per FDA.

title: OSHA Food Manufacturing Safety
description: Apply OSHA general industry standards to food manufacturing.

title: Ammonia Refrigeration PSM
description: Apply OSHA Process Safety Management to ammonia refrigeration with TQ above threshold.

title: EPA Risk Management Plan
description: Submit RMP for facilities with regulated substances above threshold.

title: Bloodborne Pathogens for First Aiders
description: Apply bloodborne pathogens standard for designated food worker first aiders.

title: OSHA HazCom for Cleaning Chemicals
description: Maintain HazCom program for cleaning and sanitizing chemicals.

title: FDA Food Code
description: Apply FDA Food Code 2022 in retail food establishments.

title: Local Retail Food Permits
description: Maintain local health department food service permits.

title: HACCP Certification
description: Implement HACCP per Codex Alimentarius CAC/RCP 1-1969.

title: GFSI Recognition
description: Maintain GFSI-recognized certification (FSSC 22000, BRCGS, SQF, IFS, GlobalG.A.P.).

title: TTB Alcohol Labeling
description: Apply TTB labeling rules for alcoholic beverages.

title: TTB Excise Tax Reporting
description: Report and pay TTB excise taxes on alcohol production.

title: FDA Tobacco Regulation
description: Comply with FDA tobacco regulation for tobacco-containing products.

title: Structure-Function Claims Limits
description: Apply DSHEA structure-function claims with FDA notification for supplements.

title: Lawful Basis for Customer Data
description: Document lawful basis for customer personal data processing.

title: 72-Hour Breach Notification
description: Notify supervisory authority of personal data breach within 72 hours.

title: Cross-Border Transfer Safeguards
description: Use SCCs or adequacy decisions for personal data transfers outside EEA.

title: California Consumer Privacy
description: Honor CCPA rights for California food customers.

title: PCI-DSS for Restaurant POS
description: Apply PCI-DSS controls to restaurant payment processing.

title: Security Trust Services Criteria
description: Implement controls aligned with AICPA TSC for security.

title: Food Manufacturing ISMS
description: Establish ISMS for food manufacturing systems including supplier portals.

title: FSMA Lab Accreditation Rule
description: Use FSMA-accredited labs for required food testing.

title: AOAC Validated Methods
description: Use AOAC-validated test methods for analytical food testing.

title: FSIS Recall Procedures
description: Apply FSIS recall procedures for meat and poultry incidents.

title: Reportable Food Registry
description: Report Class I problems to FDA Reportable Food Registry within 24 hours.

title: Mock Recall Exercises
description: Conduct mock recall exercises annually to test recall plan effectiveness.

title: Sodium Disclosure
description: Disclose sodium content per FDA labeling regulations.

title: Added Sugar Disclosure
description: Disclose added sugar separately per Nutrition Facts panel update.

title: Vitamin D and Potassium
description: Declare Vitamin D and potassium per updated Nutrition Facts panel.

title: OFAC for International Food Trade
description: Screen export customers against OFAC sanctions list.

title: USDA Export Certificates
description: Obtain USDA export certificates for meat, poultry, and egg exports.

title: Foodborne Outbreak Response
description: Cooperate with FDA, CDC, and state health departments in outbreak investigations.

title: Sesame as 9th Major Allergen
description: Declare sesame as major food allergen per FASTER Act effective 2023.

title: FDA Compliance Date Adherence
description: Meet FDA compliance dates for new food regulations.

title: USDA Generic Approval
description: Use USDA generic label approval for qualifying meat/poultry labels.

title: EU AI Act for Food AI
description: Apply EU AI Act transparency obligations to food sorting and quality AI.

title: EU CSRD Reporting
description: Report sustainability per EU Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive.

title: EU Packaging and Packaging Waste
description: Comply with EU PPWR for food packaging including recycled content.

title: Public Health Notifications
description: Issue public health notifications during food safety incidents.

title: Food Business Continuity
description: Establish BCMS for food business continuity per ISO 22301.
